2014_sale_price_confirmed.source: Springfield Assessor commercial property record card (Sales/Ownership History section)
2014_sale_price_confirmed.note: Confirms and refines the deed we already found via Hampden Registry (book/page 20442/561, 2014-09-29, grantor Urstadt Biddle Properties). Registry gave us the transaction; the assessor record card gave us the actual dollar price and deed type (SALE OF MULTIPLE PARCELS). Two independent sources now agree on this transaction -- Verified tier.

1970_prior_sale_found.note: Full ownership chain now spans 1970 (original development era, matches Card 1 year_built=1970) through 2014 (Urstadt Biddle -> Five Town Station LLC/Phillips Edison) to present.

building_sqft_independent_validation.method: Summed Interior/Exterior Information area tables across every building card on all 9 parcels via Springfield assessor record cards (a completely independent GOVERNMENT source, never touched before now).
building_sqft_independent_validation.verdict: MATCH within normal measurement-convention tolerance (assessor sqft vs. leasing GLA often differ ~2-5% due to different measurement standards). Building size is now confirmed by THREE independent sources (2 private marketing, 1 government), not just one.
building_sqft_independent_validation.data_quality_catch: Initial pass wrongly included a 65,340 sqft LAND-type record card (1761 Allen St, card 2) which inflated the naive total by 22%. Structure_type field must be checked per card -- not every card on a parcel is a building; some are land-only entries. Caught and excluded before reporting.

permit_history_pulled.source: Springfield Assessor record card, Permit Information section (main parcel only so far)
permit_history_pulled.note: This directly satisfies spec section 13 (Permit/Inspection/Code data) for the main parcel -- real permit_type/date/value records, not inferred.

zoning_refined.note: More specific official zoning code than the coarse CSV export had.

findings.use_classification_confirmed: Class 323: Shopping Centers (official MA assessor use code) -- corroborates property_type=retail/shopping_center classification.
